subject: A massive green scaled reptilian beast with red dorsal spines and dripping fangs, mid-roar above a hedge maze with tiny human figures fleeing in its torn path
description: A huge scaled creature fills the right two-thirds of the composition, its head thrown forward in a roar with mouth gaped wide enough to show curved fangs, saliva strung between them, and a long red tongue. The hide is mossy green with darker scale patterns; a row of red triangular spines runs along the spine and skull, with smaller red horns curving back from the brow. Forelimbs end in heavy hooked talons, one foreclaw raised mid-stride. Behind the creature, an orange-yellow sun hangs low in a dark teal sky and is overlaid with a grid-cross emblem; small bird silhouettes scatter across the haze. Below and to the left, dark tangled hedge walls funnel into a narrow misty corridor where three small human silhouettes hunch and flee away from the monster. The palette is dense forest greens, blood reds, and a single sickly amber sun.
foreground: roaring scaled green beast with red spines and dripping fangs, claw raised
background: hedge maze corridor with fleeing human silhouettes, dark trees, and a low amber sun bearing a grid-cross emblem in a teal sky
emotion: predatory rage, jaws open mid-roar, claws raised; prey-figures hunched and terrified
